title: ipomoea arenaria
intro: Ipomoea arenaria, also known as Beach Morning Glory, is a flowering vine native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea arenaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Ipomoea arenaria is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
